nodes.label: MIDI Input
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI events (note on, note off, CC, pitch bend, aftertouch, program change, timer)

nodes.label: onInit
nodes.description: Runs once at compile time. Declare variables, create UI components, set up references.

nodes.label: onNoteOn
nodes.description: Fires on every MIDI note-on event. Access event via Message object.

nodes.label: onNoteOff
nodes.description: Fires on every MIDI note-off event. Access event via Message object.

nodes.label: onController
nodes.description: Fires on CC, pitch bend, aftertouch, and program change events. Access event via Message object.

nodes.label: onTimer
nodes.description: Fires at interval set by Synth.startTimer(). Sample-accurate in real-time mode.

nodes.label: onControl
nodes.description: Fires when a UI component value changes. Receives component reference and new value.

nodes.label: Event Dispatch
nodes.description: Routes incoming events to the appropriate callback based on event type.

nodes.label: Deferred Mode
nodes.description: If deferred, queue event for message thread processing. Otherwise process on audio thread.

nodes.label: MIDI Output
nodes.description: Modified MIDI events passed to the next processor in the chain.

nodes.label: Message
nodes.description: API object for reading and modifying the current MIDI event.

nodes.label: Synth
nodes.description: API object for controlling the parent synthesiser, timer, and voice management.

nodes.label: Engine
nodes.description: API object for global engine functions.

nodes.label: Content
nodes.description: API object for creating and managing UI components.
